args: set -eu; PATH="${PATH:-}:/bin:/usr/bin:/run/current-system/sw/bin"; export PATH; for candidate in ./bin/tiber ./plugins/tiber/bin/tiber "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/ai-plugins/tiber/*/bin/tiber; do if [ -x "$candidate" ]; then exec "$candidate" mcp stdio; fi; done; echo "tiber.mcp_launcher_missing" >&2; exit 127
tiber.description: Tiber stdio MCP server for Git-backed task board reads and writes.
